scripts.install: docker compose run --rm -v bundle:/usr/local/bundle -e BUNDLE_WITHOUT='development:test' jekyll bundle install && npm ci
scripts.bundle:clean: docker compose run --rm jekyll bash -lc bundle exec jekyll clean
scripts.build:jekyll: docker compose run --rm -v bundle:/usr/local/bundle -e BUNDLE_WITHOUT='development:test' jekyll bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.build:purge: npm run stats:css:before && npx --no-install purgecss --config purgecss.config.js && npm run stats:css:after && npm run stats:css:report
scripts.build: npm run prebuild && npm run build:jekyll && npm run build:purge
scripts.ci:htmlproofer: docker compose run --rm -v bundle:/usr/local/bundle jekyll bash -lc "bundle config unset without || true; bundle install && bundle exec htmlproofer ./_site || echo 'htmlproofer failed'"
scripts.analyze:html: find _site -name '*.html' -exec sh -c 'echo {} && ls -lh {} | awk "{print \$5}" && npx gzip-size-cli < {}' \;
scripts.analyze:css: find _site/assets/css -type f -name "*.css" ! -name "*.map" -exec sh -c 'echo {} && ls -lh {} | awk "{print \$5}" && npx gzip-size-cli < {}' \;
scripts.analyze:js: find _site/assets/js -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "*.js" ! -name "*.map" -exec sh -c 'echo {} && ls -lh {} | awk "{print \$5}" && npx gzip-size-cli < {}' \;
scripts.analyze:assets: npm run analyze:css && npm run analyze:js
scripts.analyze:all: npm run analyze:html && npm run analyze:assets
